## Checklist for a workflow PR
- [ ] `workflow.json` is valid JSON and has top-level `name`, `nodes`, `connections`
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or real emails in the JSON (use `your-…@example.com` placeholders)
- [ ] No `credentials` blocks (n8n strips them on export — verify before committing)
- [ ] Workflow has its own folder under `workflows/<name>/`
- [ ] `README.md` documents: use case, tech stack, setup steps, cost estimate
- [ ] `architecture.md` includes a mermaid flow diagram
- [ ] Root `README.md` workflow table is updated
